app.name: AkovoLabs
app.description: Ukunika amandla ama-ISP ngemibono ehlakaniphile, ukuqapha ngesikhathi sangempela, nokuphepha kwezinga lebhizinisi
app.version: Inguqulo yohlelo 1.0.0 © 2026 AkovoLabs. Wonke amalungelo agodliwe.

nav.logoutModalMessage: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphuma kwi-akhawunti yakho?

footer.newsletter: Thola izindaba ezintsha kanye nezimemezelo zezici
footer.newsletterNote: Sithembisa ukuthi ngeke sigcwalise ibhokisi lakho lokungena. Khansela noma nini.

layout.tagline: Ukuhlaziywa kwejubane kwesikhathi sangempela okunamandla e-AI kanye nemininingwane yokuphepha yenethiwekhi yama-ISP
layout.agreement: Ngokudala noma ukusebenzisa i-akhawunti ye-AkovoLabs, uyavumelana **nemigomo nemibandela** kanye **nenqubomgomo yobumfihlo** yethu.

register.heading: Dala i-akhawunti
register.agreeDesktop: Ngiyavumelana nemigomo nemibandela kanye nenqubomgomo yobumfihlo
register.successMessage: Sithumele isixhumanisi sokuqinisekisa ku-**{{email}}**. Chofoza isixhumanisi ukuze uvule i-akhawunti yakho.
register.spamNote: Uma ungayiboni i-imeyili, hlola ifolda yakho ye-spam noma uzame ukubhalisa futhi.

validation.minChars: Iphasiwedi kufanele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu eziyi-8
validation.uppercase: Iphasiwedi kufanele iqukathe okungenani uhlamvu olulodwa olukhulu
validation.lowercase: Iphasiwedi kufanele iqukathe okungenani uhlamvu olulodwa oluncane
validation.number: Iphasiwedi kufanele iqukathe okungenani inombolo eyodwa
validation.special: Iphasiwedi kufanele iqukathe okungenani uhlamvu olulodwa olukhethekile (!@#$%^&*(),.?":{|}<>)
validation.agreeTerms: Kufanele uvumelane nemigomo nemibandela kanye nenqubomgomo yobumfihlo ukuze udale i-akhawunti.

forgot.emailStepSubtitle: Faka i-imeyili obhalise ngayo futhi sizokuthumelela ikhodi yokuqinisekisa.
forgot.passwordStepSubtitle: Iphasiwedi yakho entsha kufanele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu eziyi-8.
forgot.successSubtitle: Iphasiwedi yakho isethiwe kabusha ngempumelelo. Manje ungangena ngephasiwedi yakho entsha.

verify.successMessage: I-imeyili yakho iqinisekisiwe ngempumelelo. Manje ungangena kwi-akhawunti yakho.
verify.errorMessage: Isixhumanisi sokuqinisekisa asivumelekile noma siphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ubhalise futhi.
verify.connectionError: Ayikwazi ukuxhuma kuseva. Hlola ukuxhumana kwakho kwe-inthanethi.
verify.serverError: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Zama futhi kamuva.

logoutModal.message: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphuma kwi-akhawunti yakho?

advisory.downloadOverTime: **Ijubane Lokulanda Ngokuhamba Kwesikhathi:** Ikhombisa ukuqina kokuxhumana
advisory.uploadOverTime: **Ijubane Lokulayisha Ngokuhamba Kwesikhathi:** Ikala ukusebenza kokulayisha
advisory.appLatency: **I-App Latency:** Ilandelela ukuthi idivayisi yakho ifinyelela ngokushesha kangakanani kule sevisi ngesikhathi sokuhlola

home.aiSummaryPlaceholder: Isifinyezo sakho sokuhlola ijubane sizovela lapha ngemuva kokuthi uhlelo luchaze imiphumela.

howToUseCards.currentDevice: Ungenza ukuhlola ijubane kusuka kudivayisi yakho yamanje nokuxhumana kwakho. Uma use-Wi-Fi wasekhaya, imiphumela ikhombisa ulwazi lwakho lwangempela.
howToUseCards.deviceToServer: Ikala ukusebenza kwedivayisi ukuya kuseva, hhayi ukuhlolwa okujulile kwerouter yakho noma imininingwane ye-Wi-Fi yangaphakathi.
howToUseCards.signedIn: Manje njengoba ungenile, ungakhohlwa ukubheka amagrafu akho wokuhlola kanye nomlando ngezansi!
howToUseCards.signedOut: **Ngena ngemvume** noma **Bhalisa** ukuze uthole imininingwane eningiliziwe mayelana nokusebenza kwenethiwekhi yakho!

signInModal.message: Ngena ukuze uthole imininingwane eningiliziwe emiphumeleni yakho yokuhlola ijubane. Ingabe ufisa ukuya ekhasini lokungena?

services.heroDesc: Kusukela ekuhloleni ijubane elisheshayo kuya ekuskeneni okuthuthukile kokuphepha kanye nokuhlaziywa kwe-AI, sihlinzeka izixazululo eziphelele zenethiwekhi kubasebenzisi basekhaya, amabhizinisi amancane, nama-ISP.

speedtest.title: Ukuhlola Ijubane
speedtest.description: Ukuhlola ijubane okusheshayo ngezilinganiso zesikhathi sangempela, idatha yomlando, nokubonwa okuhle. Kala ukulanda, ukulayisha, i-ping ne-jitter ngokunemba.

networkAnalysis.title: Ukuhlaziya Inethiwekhi
networkAnalysis.description: Ukuxilonga okujulile kwenethiwekhi, ukuhlaziya nokuqapha ukusebenza. Khomba izithiyo nezimo ezingavamile zenethiwekhi ngokuzenzakalelayo.

security.title: Ukuphepha
security.description: Ukuskena kwamachweba okuthuthukile, ukuthola ubungozi, nokuhlola ubungozi ukugcina inethiwekhi yakho iphephile ekuhlaselweni.

aiInsights.title: Imininingwane ye-AI
aiInsights.description: Imininingwane enikwe amandla i-AI, ukukala, nezincomo ezihlakaniphile zokwenza ngcono ukusebenza kwenethiwekhi yakho ngokuzenzakalelayo.

download.headline: I-AkovoLabs Speedtest
download.subtitle: Kushesha. Kunembile. Kuhlakaniphile.
download.betaAdvisory: Joyina uhlelo lwethu lokuhlola i-beta ukuze uthole ukufinyelela kwangaphambi kwesikhathi! Idatha yakho ivikelwe ngombhalo oqinile wokugcina.

news.subtitle: Hlala unolwazi ngokuthuthuka kwakamuva, ukukhishwa kwezici, kanye nokwenza ngcono kwenkundla yethu yokuphepha yenethiwekhi enikwe amandla i-AI.

about.heroDesc: Sakha ikusasa lokuhlolwa kwejubane le-inthanethi nokuhlaziywa kwenethiwekhi. I-AkovoLabs Speedtest inika ama-ISP nabasebenzisi imininingwane engakaze ibonwe mayelana nokusebenza, ukuphepha, nokwethenjelwa kwenethiwekhi.
about.storyParagraph1: E-AkovoLabs, sikholelwa ukuthi ubuchwepheshe kufanele benze impilo ibe lula esikhundleni sokuyinkimbinkimbi. Yingakho sakhe i-AkovoLabs Speedtest, inkundla yokuhlola inethiwekhi enamandla futhi eqondakalayo.
about.storyParagraph2: Umgomo wethu ukwenza ukuphathwa kwenethiwekhi kufinyeleleke kuwo wonke umuntu. Noma ungumsebenzisi wasekhaya ofuna ukwazi ngenethiwekhi yakho noma i-ISP ephethe izinkulungwane zamakhasimende, i-AkovoLabs Speedtest ikunikeza imininingwane oyidingayo.
about.storyParagraph3: Ngokuqapha ngesikhathi sangempela, ukuthola okungavamile okuhlakaniphile, nokubonwa okuhle, senza ukuphathwa kwenethiwekhi kube lula, kunamandla, futhi kufinyeleleke kubo bonke.
about.quote: Ubuchwepheshe obuhlakaniphile, ijubane elisheshayo, nemininingwane esebenzisekayo ngoba ukuxhumana kufanele kusebenzele wena, hhayi ngokumelene nawe.

teamMember1.name: Clement Phoshoko
teamMember1.quote: Wonke umkhiqizo omkhulu uqala ngokuxazulula inkinga yangempela. Ngakha izixazululo eziqhutshwa yi-AI, ezenzakalelayo nezinwebekayo ngezindlela zesimanje.

teamMember2.name: Tsumbedzo Matloga
teamMember2.quote: Cabanga ukubona konke ukuxhumana, yonke imethrikhi, nazo zonke izinto ezingavamile endaweni eyodwa. Leyo amandla okuhlaziya inethiwekhi okuhlakaniphile.

contact.subject: Isihloko
contact.successMessage: Siyabonga ukuthi uxhumane ne-AkovoLabs. Ithimba lethu lizobuyekeza umbuzo wakho futhi liphendule maduze.
contact.failedMessage: Umlayezo wehlulekile ukuthunyelwa. Zama futhi kamuva.

validation.messageMinLength: Umlayezo kufanele okungenani ube nezinhlamvu eziyi-10

history.title: Umlando Wokuhlola
history.subtitle: Buyekeza ukuhlola kwakho kwejubane kwangaphambilini, ulandelela izitayela zokusebenza, futhi uthole imininingwane mayelana nempilo yenethiwekhi yakho.

performanceTrends.title: Izitayela Zokusebenza
performanceTrends.speedAutoScaleNote: Izimbazo zejubane zizilinganisela ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuze izitayela ezincane zihlale zifundeka.
performanceTrends.amberDotNote: Amachashazi ansomi amaka ukuhlola lapho ijubane lokuxhumana liguquke kakhulu phakathi kwezindlela.
performanceTrends.latencyAutoScaleNote: Amanani e-latency azilinganisela ngokuzenzakalelayo kububanzi be-pinge ne-jitter ebonakalayo.

insights.title: Imininingwane ye-AI
insights.avgSpeedMessage: Ijubane lakho elijwayelekile lokulanda lingu-{{download}} Mbps nokulayisha lingu-{{upload}} Mbps.
insights.pingLowMessage: I-ping yakho iphansi ngokuqhubekayo, kuhle kakhulu emidlalweni nezingcingo zevidiyo!
insights.pingModerateMessage: I-ping yakho yamukelekile, kodwa ingaba ngcono ezinhlelweni zesikhathi sangempela.
insights.pingHighMessage: I-ping yakho iphezulu impela, cabanga ukuhlola ukuxhumana kwakho kwenethiwekhi.
insights.bestTestMessage: Ukuhlola kwakho okungcono kakhulu kuthole inholo yempilo engu-{{score}}!
insights.instabilityMessage: I-{{count}} yokuhlola kwakho okungu-{{total}} ikhombise ukushintshashintsha kwejubane phakathi kwezindlela, okukhombisa ukuxhumana okungazinzile.
insights.instabilityMessage_plural: Ama-{{count}} wokuhlola kwakho angu-{{total}} akhombise ukushintshashintsha kwejubane phakathi kwezindlela, okukhombisa ukuxhumana okungazinzile.
insights.deviceHealth: Ukuhlolwa Kwenholo Yempilo Yenethiwekhi Ezingeni Ledivayisi

empty.withFiltersTitle: Akukho ukuhlola kwejubane okufana nezihlungi ozisebenzisile.
empty.withFiltersMessage: Zama ukwandisa ububanzi bezinsuku noma sula izihlungi ukuze ubone imiphumela eminingi.
empty.withoutFiltersTitle: Akukho mlando wokuhlola kwejubane okhona okwamanje.
empty.withoutFiltersMessage: Gijima ukuhlola kwejubane ukuze uqale ukwakha umlando wakho futhi uvule imininingwane yezitayela.

statsCards.latencyNoteDesc: Izicelo ezisheshayo zohlelo zithunyelwa kule sevisi ukulinganisela ukusabela kwedivayisi yakho yamanje nenethiwekhi.
statsCards.latencyNoteDesc2: Lokhu kuwusizo ekusebenzeni kwangempela kokuphenya, kodwa akufani ne-ICMP ping evamile.

success.emailMessage: Sithumele i-imeyili yokuqinisekisa ekhelini lakho elisha.

modals.savePersonalInfo: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukulondoloza izinguquko zemininingwane yakho?
modals.updateEmail: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukubuyekeza ikheli lakho le-imeyili? Kuzodingeka uqinisekise i-imeyili yakho entsha.
modals.signOut: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphuma kwi-akhawunti yakho?

security.title: Ukuphepha Kwamachweba
security.subtitle: Qapha izinsiza eziveziwe, gijima ukuskena okusebenzayo, futhi ugcine indawo yokuhlasela yenethiwekhi ingekho ekusebenzeni.
security.howItWorks: Lokhu kuskena kubheka amachweba avamile ezinsiza futhi kuwahlukanise njengavulekile, avaliwe, noma ahlungiwe, bese kuthola isimo sobungozi.
security.howItWorks2: Sebenzisa lokhu njengesisekelo sokuchayeka okusebenzayo futhi uqinisekise okutholakele okunobungozi obukhulu ngemithetho yodonga lomlilo nobunikazi bezinsiza.
security.aiSummaryPlaceholder: Isifinyezo sakho sokuphepha sizovela lapha ngemuva kokuthi ukuskena sekuqediwe futhi kwahlaziywa.

emptyState.title: Akukho nhlolovo yamanje
emptyState.message: Sebenzisa isondo lokuskena ukugijima ukuskena, bese izilinganiso zakho zokubuka konke kanye nesifinyezo se-AI kuzovela lapha.

security.emptyPorts: Akukho machweba avulekile atholakele kulokhu kuskena.

insights.title: Umlando Wokuskena Nezitayela
insights.subtitle: Chofoza noma yikuphi ukuskena kwakamuva ngezansi ukuze ubone imiphumela yako.
insights.emptyMessage: Gijima ukuskena kokuphepha ukuze uqale ukwakha umlando wakho futhi uvule imininingwane yezitayela.

knowledge.title: Izincomo zokuphepha nereferensi yezinsiza
knowledge.description: Buyekeza imihlahlandlela yakamuva ye-AI, hlola izinsiza ezivezwe kakhulu ekuskeneni kwakho, futhi ugcine ikhathalogi yamachweba avamile nezeluleko zokunciphisa.
knowledge.emptyMessage: Ireferensi yolwazi lwamachweba izovela lapha lapho ikhathalogi yezinsiza itholakala.

scanEmptyState.title: Ayikho idatha yokuskena okwamanje
scanEmptyState.message: Qala ukuskena kwakho kokuqala ukuze ugcwalise le phaneli.

authRequired.title: 401 - Ukufinyelela kunqatshiwe
authRequired.message: Hhayi! Kumele ungene ukuze ufinyelele leli khasi.
authRequired.subtitle: Sicela ungene noma udale i-akhawunti ukuze uqhubeke.

notFound.title: 404 - Ikhasi alitholakali
notFound.subtitle: Mhlawumbe lihanjisiwe, lisiwe, noma ubhale i-URL ngephutha.
notFound.goHome: Iya ekhaya futhi ugijime ukuhlola ijubane

seo.homeDesc: I-dashboard yokuhlola ijubane le-inthanethi nokuhlaziya inethiwekhi ene-AI. Hlola ukuxhumana kwakho, qapha ukusebenza, futhi uthole imininingwane ehlakaniphile.
seo.aboutDesc: Funda nge-AkovoLabs — umgomo wethu wokunika amandla ama-ISP ngokuhlaziya inethiwekhi okuqhutshwa yi-AI, ukuqapha ngesikhathi sangempela, nokuphepha kwezinga lebhizinisi.
seo.servicesDesc: Hlola iqoqo lethu lamathuluzi okuqapha inethiwekhi ahlanganisa ukuhlola ijubane, ukuskena ukuphepha, ukuhlaziya ubungozi bembobo, nemininingwane ye-AI.
seo.newsDesc: Izindaba zakamuva, okuthunyelwe kwebhulogi, nezibuyekezo ezivela ku-AkovoLabs mayelana nobuchwepheshe benethiwekhi, ukuvikeleka kwe-inthanethi, nemininingwane ye-ISP.
seo.downloadDesc: Landa uhlelo lokusebenza lweselula lwe-AkovoLabs lwe-Android ne-iOS. Hlola ijubane lakho le-inthanethi noma ukuphi.
seo.historyDesc: Buka umlando wakho wokuhlola ijubane le-inthanethi, ulandelela izitayela zokusebenza, futhi uhlaziye ukuqina kokuxhumana ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
seo.securityDesc: Gijima ukuskena ukuphepha kwenethiwekhi, hlaziya amachweba avulekile, hlola amazinga engcuphe, futhi uthole izincomo ze-AI.
seo.accountDesc: Phatha izilungiselelo ze-akhawunti yakho ye-AkovoLabs, buyekeza iphrofayili yakho, futhi umise izintandokazi zakho.
seo.loginDesc: Ngena ku-akhawunti yakho ye-AkovoLabs ukuze ufinyelele umlando wokuhlola ijubane, ukuskena ukuphepha, nemininingwane eyenza wena.
seo.authRequiredDesc: Udinga ukungena ukuze ufinyelele leli khasi.
